meta.notes: Table must have at least 10 rows — empty or near-empty loads indicate pipeline failure.
Schema must have exactly 11 columns — any addition or removal signals a breaking change.
Column names and order must exactly match the canonical schema contract.
transaction_id is the primary key — no duplicates allowed.
Sales rep IDs must reference valid REP-NN codes from the HR system.
For most products, total amount should exceed quantity (unit price > $1). Catches unit/currency mix-ups.
Placeholder for cross-batch volume reconciliation against upstream source count.
Every transaction must be attributed to a sales rep for commission calculations.

meta.suite_description: Suite 04 — Referential Integrity & Row Counts: Validates schema contract, primary key uniqueness, FK patterns, and expected table volume.
